Video.summary: Bread is a branded product with an endless number of varieties and providers. But do we actually know what we eat every day? We meet small craft bakers who stand up for their quality and we meet CEOs who work on bread as an industrial mass product which becomes increasingly artificial. How can traditional bakery skills survive? And how will the future of bread look like?
Video.title: BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE

Image.alt: BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE
BREAD. AN EVERYDAY MIRACLE

Video.summary: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.
Video.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered

Image.alt: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
Fantastic Fungi: Remastered

Video.summary: In Sun City, the retirement community in Arizona, the residents show us how to make the best of life when death casts its shadow in old age – with attitude!
Video.title: VERY SENIOR - ATTITUDE IS EVERYTHING

Image.alt: VERY SENIOR - ATTITUDE IS EVERYTHING
VERY SENIOR - ATTITUDE IS EVERYTHING

Video.summary: Does sunshine increase desire? Plus, can couples really keep the spark alive as they age? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex
Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex
Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex

Video.summary: Want to know the secrets of great kissers? And we’ll show you what exercise seniors can do to improve their sex lives. Plus dealing with the emotions during a divorce.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers
Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers
Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers

Video.summary: How can we remain calm and centered during stressful times? Today Lisa talks about meditation with Sister Dr. Jenna, an acclaimed spiritual mentor committed to bridging divides in societies and building relationships between global influencers. Info: meditationmuseum.org.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Keep Calm in Chaotic Times

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Keep Calm in Chaotic Times
The Aware Show - Keep Calm in Chaotic Times
The Aware Show - Keep Calm in Chaotic Times

Video.summary: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about “good fats,” healthy eating, and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving! Info: Udoschoice.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Dr. Harley Rotbart, a nationally renowned pediatrician, who speaks about his book “No Regrets Living” which outlines keys to living a life of wonder & contentment including self-forgiveness, opening to miracles, & discovery.
Video.title: The Aware Show - No Regrets Living

Image.alt: The Aware Show - No Regrets Living
The Aware Show - No Regrets Living
The Aware Show - No Regrets Living

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Fast Company Senior writer Nicole LaPorte. She researched the divide between the haves & have-nots including examining the vicious competitiveness of college admissions, bribes & lack of ethics within certain departments.
Video.title: The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed

Image.alt: The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed
The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed
The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed

Video.summary: A diagnosis of childhood cancer came as a shock to the Shoeneck family who found out about their daughter Kenedi's malignant tumor after an unexpected fall. This episode of Hope is Here proves the power of love and creativity as The Sing Me a Story Foundation pairs Kenedi and well-known songwriter Kat Perkins to create a happy and memorable tune that delivers hope, strength, and laughter to a family who needs a reason to smile.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E4

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E4
Hope Is Here S2E4
Hope Is Here S2E4

Video.summary: Our youth and all the experiences that makeup one's childhood, good and bad, can affect the person we ultimately become. Yet we often have a choice in that destiny. Ana Viamonte Ros is a woman who confirms that although insurmountable challenges and negative experiences from the past can shape our future, hard work and a determined, healthy mindset can pave the way toward a gratifying life. Today Dr. Viamonte dedicates her life to helping patients strengthen their mental health and conquer childhood traumas while serving as living proof that perseverance and hope make dreams attainable.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E5

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E5
Hope Is Here S2E5
Hope Is Here S2E5

Video.summary: The way to healing can take on different forms. Little 7-year-old Leonor, was suffering from a very rare cancer, and it was decided she needed an uplifting project to give her hope. What better medicine than an endearing song that was created from Lenore and her sister Dot's imagination and a ridiculously cute and famous dog named Doug the Pug? This episode of Hope is Here is about how a famous dog, creativity, and a group of caring individuals came together to give a little girl a world of hope to carry on. The path to healing can manifest in various ways. Meet Leonor, a resilient 7-year-old girl battling a highly uncommon form of cancer. Recognizing her need for inspiration and optimism, a heartwarming project was conceived. What could be more uplifting than a captivating melody born from the vivid imaginations of Leonor and her sister Dot, accompanied by the adorable and renowned Doug the Pug? In this episode of Hope is Here we witness the extraordinary convergence of a beloved canine, boundless creativity, and a compassionate community, all united to bestow upon a young girl a profound sense of hope for the future.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E6

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E6
Hope Is Here S2E6
Hope Is Here S2E6

Video.summary: Parents raise their children to ultimately achieve their independence. Yet removing barriers to attain the goal of independence is filled with great challenges for parents of children with special needs. Hope is Here focuses on a family, a very special foundation, and a Florida hospital system that is going to great lengths to empower individuals with intellectual disabilities with strength, confidence, and a sense of self-worth.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E7

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E7
Hope Is Here S2E7
Hope Is Here S2E7

Video.summary: Imagine being a child fighting cancer. Treatments, medications, and uncertainty fill your day. A boy named Oliver decided to face his disease and pain with fierce determination. Once strong again, he was filled with gratitude because of the love and support he received during his treatment. Yet it was a symbolic jacket that he wore during the days of his cancer treatments that inspired him to start his organization designed to cheer up other children dealing with cancer around the United States. Hope is Here covers the selfless story of Oliver's Patch Project.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E8

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E8
Hope Is Here S2E8
Hope Is Here S2E8

Video.summary: Ventilator-dependent children are limited in their ability to participate in sports and recreation. Enjoying childhood to its fullest is often not possible. Every year VACC Camp affords children on ventilators the chance to enjoy a stress-free day at the beach as they are supported by camp volunteers and the Miami Beach Fire and Rescue. This episode of Hope is Here interviews a participating doctor at Nicklaus Children's Hospital as well as a family that enjoys this unique opportunity to see their child enjoy the beach for the first time.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E9

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E9
Hope Is Here S2E9
Hope Is Here S2E9

Video.summary: Finding inspiration to fight cancer calls upon the courage and an immense determination to soldier through the most challenging days. This arduous journey also requires support and love from friends and family. Michael Cramer was gifted with all these necessary ingredients to forge ahead, not only from a family who loves him but especially from a mother whose encouragement strengthened her son through his darkest moments. Here is Michael's remarkable story about a mother's love, his undying resilience, and the crucial lessons he learned about giving back the gift of survival.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E10

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E10
Hope Is Here S2E10
Hope Is Here S2E10

Video.summary: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Video.summary: If you had a chance to close Shawn, could you get it done? Today's the day we see who has the goods. Each team has one goal. Get the contract signed. Shawn is not going to make it easy, but often your audience isn't the hardest part. Sometimes getting out of your own way is the biggest challenge. Prepare to witness a pitch fest for the ages. You'll see that it doesn't matter what you're selling - a Yacht, a Ferrari, a Private Jet...or a Potato - if you don't connect with Shawn, you have no chance.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Video.summary: This is it. A winner will be chosen. The decision is FINAL...But we still have a crowd of candidates that each think they will be the one. Now comes a test of mental toughness. It's all come down to these final moments. Who can convince Shawn that they won't give up when things get...painful. What would you endure for a chance at greatness?...Watch the season finale of Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet

Video.summary: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Video.summary: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Video.summary: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Video.summary: The Man, The Legend, The King of House Music Farley JackMaster Funk!! We had the pleasure to Interview Farley and his History of House Music! Farley is a great person and will you will learn some great things about him! Enjoy and show.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Farley Jackmaster Funk

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Farley Jackmaster Funk
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Farley Jackmaster Funk
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Farley Jackmaster Funk
